headline: Is Bristol Myers' Deep Pipeline the Key to Future Growth?
summary: BMY highlights a deep pipeline with multiple late-stage candidates and registrational data expected in 2026, reinforcing confidence in its next-gen CELMoD program.

headline: Merck’s WELIREG Kidney Cancer Trials Deepen Oncology Growth Story
summary: Merck (NYSE:MRK) reported new Phase 3 data for belzutifan based WELIREG regimens in renal cell carcinoma, showing meaningful improvements when paired with KEYTRUDA or LENVIMA. The company has filed for FDA reviews that could broaden WELIREG use in both adjuvant and advanced RCC settings, with priority reviews and PDUFA dates set for 2026. These filings and data readouts extend Merck’s oncology portfolio beyond its existing blockbusters and introduce new combinations in late stage kidney...

headline: Merck Price Prediction: Sac-TMT Drug Potential Pushes MRK to $150
summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) has been on a strong recovery run, gaining 23% over the past year and 8% year-to-date, though the stock has pulled back some, now well below its 52-week high of $125.14. Most analysts hold measured views, with Street consensus sitting at $127.22. But Wells Fargo sees considerably more upside, raising ... headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Merck & Co, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Mohit Bansal   maintains Merck & Co (NYSE:MRK) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $135 to $150.
